sections.heading: The employees of the Fund established under the repealed Transfer of
sections.text: Act are hereby transferred to the Authority. Employees

sections.heading: A person who is transferred under paragraph 2 shall enjoy Terms and

tenns and conditions with the Authority that are no less favowable conditions of
employment

of

person's previous service with the Fund shall be treated as service
with the Authority.
